summary: Iteration 13 - Event Registration Admin Enhancements (Edit, Delete, Manual Registration) Testing COMPLETE. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: 100% - All new features verified including manual registration modal, edit modal with live fee calculation, delete with confirmation, and action buttons.
seed_data_creation: No persistent test data - all TEST_ prefixed registrations were cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Event Registration Admin Enhancements are complete. Features verified: (1) Manual Registration via POST /api/admin/events/{event_id}/register-manual - creates registration with payment_mode='manual', modal has all fields including name, email, phone, org, qualification, state, category, accommodation, fees (reg/accom/membership) with live total calculation, and payment status (2) Edit Registration via PUT /api/admin/event-registrations/{reg_id} - modal opens with pre-filled data, can update name, email, fees, payment status, total auto-recalculates (3) Delete Registration via DELETE /api/admin/event-registrations/{reg_id} - shows confirmation dialog, deletes on confirm, refreshes list (4) Action buttons per row: View (eye), Edit (pencil), Delete (trash) all have data-testid attributes (view-btn-{i}, edit-btn-{i}, delete-btn-{i})

backend_endpoints.PUT /api/admin/event-registrations/{reg_: PASSED - Updates registration fields (name, email, fees, payment_status, payment_mode, etc.)
backend_endpoints.DELETE /api/admin/event-registrations/{r: PASSED - Deletes registration, returns 404 for non-existent

manual_registration_modal.register_button: PASSED - Creates registration and refreshes list
